arts.ttl: Gordon Dalziel clamps Hugh Keevins' criticism of Celtic's win vs Motherwell with Schmeichel point
arts.sum: The Kasper Schmeichel Celtic stat that Hugh Keevins ignored vs Motherwell The Hoops dominated Motherwell but it didn’t stop long-term critic Hugh Keevins from putting the boot into Celtic even before the full-time whistle blew at Fir Park.

arts.ttl: Pundit says Celtic signing's best position is not left-back but another spot on pitch, Kris Boyd reacts
arts.sum: Following the news that Schlupp had been announced by the Hoops social media team, Sky Sports pundit Kris Boyd was asked about his thoughts on Celtic bringing the player to Glasgow. Celtic made Jeffrey Schlupp their only January transfer deadline day signing last night.

arts.sum: Raging diehards have voiced their simmering contempt after the club sounded a final call for Bayern

arts.sum: The Bavarian expert with an acid tongue has been left stewing as Celtic cause fear and alarm.

arts.ttl: Why Brendan Rodgers will be kicking himself as comments on Celtic striker desire and stronger squad are telling
arts.sum: Rodgers made it clear he wanted to strengthen his Celtic squad The Japanese striker told the club he wanted to leave at the end of last season and that would surely have put the Hoops on red alert in their hunt for a replacement.
